This genus is classified under the family of Cactaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as cacti. Hallieracantha dispar is a species endemic to Mexico. The classification of Hallieracantha dispar places it within the plant kingdom, specifically in the division Magnoliophyta. It is further classified into the class Magnoliopsida, order Caryophyllales, and family Cactaceae.
